title: Proposals
subtitle: Draft, send, and get sign-off on fixed-price work.

empty.heading: No proposals yet
empty.body: Draft a fixed-price quote, send it for sign-off, and convert accepted work into projects.

form.title: Title
form.itemsHint: Each line item is a proposed project with a fixed price. The client can accept any combination.
form.phasesMatch: Phases sum to the item price
form.previewHint: Your client will pick which line items to authorize. Toggle items to preview the accepted total.

validation.itemsRequired: Add at least one line item
validation.phaseSumMismatch: Phases must sum to the item price ({actual} ≠ {expected})
validation.validUntilBeforeIssued: Must be on or after the issued date

sign.heading: Proposal from {business}
sign.itemsHint: Check the items you want to authorize — you can accept any combination.
sign.itemsHintPreVerify: You'll be able to accept any combination of these items — verify your identity below to select and sign.
sign.otpHint: Before you can sign, we'll email a one-time code to {email}.
sign.announceCodeSent: A one-time code has been emailed to you. Enter it in the code field.
sign.announceVerified: Code verified — you can now select items and sign.
sign.signHint: Select the items above, then sign with your name to record your acceptance.
sign.signaturePlaceholder: Type your full name as your signature
sign.acceptNote: You are authorizing {count, plural, =1 {1 item} other {# items}} totaling {total}.
sign.declineNeedsName: Enter your name to record the decline.
sign.offerExpiredNotice: This offer's validity window ended on {date}. It can no longer be accepted — contact the sender for an updated proposal.
sign.alreadyDecided: A decision has already been recorded for this proposal.
sign.linkExpired: This sign-off link has expired. Ask the sender for a fresh link.
sign.linkInvalid: This sign-off link is invalid or has been replaced.
sign.linkProblemHint: If you believe this is a mistake, contact the person who sent you the proposal.
sign.footer: Sent securely via Shyre on behalf of {business}.

errors.otpInvalid: That code isn't right — try again.
errors.otpExpired: That code has expired — request a new one.
errors.otpLocked: Too many attempts — request a new code.
errors.otpCooldown: A code was just sent — check your inbox, and wait a minute before re-sending.
errors.consumed: A decision has already been recorded for this proposal.
errors.invalidSelection: Select at least one line item to accept.
errors.offerExpired: This offer has expired and can no longer be accepted.
errors.emailFailed: We couldn't send the email — try again shortly.

detail.sendFreezeNote: Sending freezes this draft — later changes become a new version.
detail.sendNeedsSigner: Add a signer contact to send
detail.acceptedItems: {count, plural, =1 {1 item authorized} other {# items authorized}}
detail.deleteTypeHint: Type "delete" to confirm — a deleted draft cannot be recovered.

pdf.cappedNote: Capped — phases cannot exceed this total
pdf.selectableNote: You may authorize any combination of the line items above. The accepted total is the sum of the items you select.
pdf.acceptanceNote: By signing below, I authorize the selected line items at the prices shown.
pdf.name: Name
